welcome.tagline: The social universe for motorcycle riders

login.title: Log In
login.postRegisterHint: Account created. Sign in with your email or username and password.

register.title: Create Account
register.name: Full Name (optional)
register.eula: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.eulaRequired: You must accept the agreement to continue.

otp.title: Verification Code
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{phone}}.
otp.phoneLinked: Your phone number is now linked to your account.
otp.phoneNotLinked: The code matched, but your phone number was not linked (it may already be verified on another account).
otp.nextLoginHint: Sign-in still uses your email/username and password (or social providers when enabled).

otpRequest.title: Phone Verification
otpRequest.subtitle: Enter your phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +905551112233). We'll send a 6-digit code.
otpRequest.disabled: Phone OTP is turned off on the server. Sign in with your email or username and password.

social.eulaA11y: Accept the agreement for social sign-in

errors.username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.username_invalid_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dot, underscore
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.oauth_apple_not_configured: Apple sign-in is not configured on the server.
errors.oauth_google_not_configured: Google sign-in is not configured on the server.
errors.oauth_email_provider_mismatch: This email is linked to a different sign-in method
errors.oauth_username_exhausted: Could not create a username. Please contact support
errors.otp_disabled: Phone OTP is disabled. Use email or username and password to sign in.

home.storiesEmpty: No stories yet. They’ll show when people you follow post.
home.emptyFeed: No posts yet. Follow someone to fill your feed.

story.unavailable: This story is unavailable or may have expired.

profile.errorLoad: We couldn’t load your profile. Try again.
profile.badgesEmpty: No badges yet. Complete quests to start earning them.

eventCreate.title: New event
eventCreate.meetingRequired: Pick a meeting point or grant location access.

settings.title: Settings

field.name: Name
field.ridingStyleHint: Comma, semicolon, or new line. Max 10 tags.

settings.editBadUrl: Enter a valid image URL, or clear the field.
settings.emergencyIntro: We’ll use these for safety alerts. Phone numbers must be in E.164 format (e.g. +15551234567).
settings.emergencyError: Couldn’t update the list. Check the phone number format.
settings.blockedIntro: You won’t see each other in feeds, DMs, or on the map. Unblock to restore access.
settings.deletionIntro: You can request account deletion. You’ll have a grace period to cancel from this screen. Optional password may be required if you use one.
settings.deletionConfirmBody: Your account will be scheduled for removal. You can cancel before the end of the waiting period.
settings.deletionPending: A deletion is already scheduled for your account.
settings.deletionDays: {{n}} day(s) remaining in the waiting period
settings.rowChangeEmailDesc: Start email change (verify from your inbox)
settings.rowVerifyEmailDesc: Paste the token from the verification email
settings.changeEmailIntro: Enter your new email and current password. We’ll send a confirmation link.
settings.changeEmailSuccessBody: Pending change to {{email}}. Open the link we sent to confirm.
settings.verifyEmailIntro: Paste the one-time token from the verification email.
settings.changeUsernameIntro: Pick a new username. Your old profile links will change.
settings.devicesIntro: Push tokens registered for your account. Revoke removes notifications for that token only.
settings.devicesLocalToken: If available, you can register this device's push token to your account.
settings.devicesRevokeNote: If you want to stop notifications for a specific device, revoke its push token.
settings.devicesNoLocalToken: No push token available on this device.
settings.changePasswordIntro: You’ll stay signed in on this device. Other sessions may be signed out per server policy.
settings.passwordValidation: Check that passwords match and meet the minimum length.
settings.passwordWrong: Current password is incorrect or request failed.

userProfile.notFound: This profile doesn’t exist or is unavailable.
userProfile.blockBody: You won’t see each other in feeds, messages, or on the map. You can unblock later in settings.

empty.title: No active riders around.
empty.body: Be the first one out on the road!

partyCreate.title: New party
partyCreate.name: Party name
partyCreate.loadError: Party was created but details could not be loaded.

ride.noPartyBody: Check invites in Inbox or create a new party.

sharing.title: Location Sharing
sharing.subtitle: Choose who can see you on the map.

descriptions.OFF: No one can see your location.
descriptions.FOLLOWERS_ONLY: People who follow you can see you.
descriptions.MUTUAL_FOLLOWERS: Only mutual follows can see you.
descriptions.PARTY_ONLY: Only party members can see you.
descriptions.PUBLIC: Everyone on Motogram can see you.

map.partyLeaveBody: You can only rejoin with a new invite after you leave.

location.deniedBody: Allow location access to show your position and load nearby riders, parties, and events.
location.errorBody: We couldn’t read your location. Try again.
location.bgBody: Ride mode shares your location even when the screen is off. Enable “Allow all the time” in settings.

sos.label: SOS
sos.a11yHint: Hold 3 seconds to send an emergency alert

discover.empty: No communities to show here yet.
discover.locationDenied: Location permission is needed to list nearby communities.

community.title: Community
community.rulesDefault: No specific rules yet. Be respectful and ride safe.
community.joinedPending: Your request was sent to moderators.
community.createIntro: Create a permanent group with a name and visibility. You can edit details later.

inbox.emptyAllDm: No DMs or group chats yet. Start from a community or profile.
inbox.emptyCommunity: No messages in this community chat.
inbox.emptyCommunityList: No community chats yet. Join communities to open chats.
